title: SmoothMenu Refabricated
description: Removes the main menu FPS limit. Fabric port of SmoothMenu by BookerCatch
body:
# Overview 
If you have a high refresh rate monitor, you may have noticed that the main menu feels choppy and unresponsive when dragging the cursor around. This mod corrects that by uncapping the 60fps limit in the main menu.

This is a port, original mod can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/smoothmenu). Please, do not report Refabricated issues to Forge mod repo
# License
I have a permission to port the mod as it's license is MIT. I need to state that because it was [accidentally marked as ARR](https://github.com/BookerCatch/SmoothMenu/issues/1) in mods.toml of the original mod
